page_metadata.biotools__summary: Ribo Ecosystem is a set of software tools, built around the ribo file format, to facilitate analyzing ribosome profiling data at ribosome protected footprint length resolution. It consists of a pipeline, RiboFlow, and two interfaces RiboR and RiboPy.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Ribo Ecosystem is a set of software tools, built around the ribo file format, to facilitate analyzing ribosome profiling data at ribosome protected footprint length resolution. It consists of a pipeline, RiboFlow, and two interfaces RiboR and RiboPy.
